sentenceTheme: David urgently pleads for God to hasten deliverance, shame hostile pursuers, and magnify His name as the help of the poor and needy.

verses.text: Make haste, O God, to deliver me; make haste to help me, O LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: God; the true God; mighty one
the personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD

verses.text: Let them be ashamed and confounded that seek after my soul: let them be turned backward, and put to confusion, that desire my hurt.

highlightedWords.meaning: to be ashamed; be put to shame

verses.text: Let them be turned back for a reward of their shame that say, Aha, aha.
Let all those that seek thee rejoice and be glad in thee: and let such as love thy salvation say continually, Let God be magnified.

highlightedWords.meaning: to be great; to make great; magnify

verses.text: But I am poor and needy: make haste unto me, O God: thou art my help and my deliverer; O LORD, make no tarrying.

highlightedWords.meaning: to deliver; cause to escape; rescuer
